HexagonMCInst.h
Go to the documentation of this file.
1//===- HexagonMCInst.h - Hexagon sub-class of MCInst ----------------------===//
2//
3// The LLVM Compiler Infrastructure
4//
5// This file is distributed under the University of Illinois Open Source
6// License. See LICENSE.TXT for details.
7//
8//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
9//
10// This class extends MCInst to allow some VLIW annotations.
11//
12//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
13
14#ifndef LLVM_LIB_TARGET_HEXAGON_MCTARGETDESC_HEXAGONMCINST_H
15#define LLVM_LIB_TARGET_HEXAGON_MCTARGETDESC_HEXAGONMCINST_H
16
17#include "HexagonTargetMachine.h"
18#include "llvm/MC/MCInst.h"
19#include <memory>
20
21extern "C" void LLVMInitializeHexagonTargetMC();
22namespace llvm {
23class MCOperand;
24
25class HexagonMCInst : public MCInst {
26 friend void ::LLVMInitializeHexagonTargetMC();
27 // Used to access TSFlags
28 static std::unique_ptr <MCInstrInfo const> MCII;
29
30public:
31 explicit HexagonMCInst();
32 HexagonMCInst(const MCInstrDesc &mcid);
33
34 static void AppendImplicitOperands(MCInst &MCI);
35 static std::bitset<16> GetImplicitBits(MCInst const &MCI);
36 static void SetImplicitBits(MCInst &MCI, std::bitset<16> Bits);
37 static void SanityCheckImplicitOperands(MCInst const &MCI) {
38 assert(MCI.getNumOperands() >= 2 && "At least the two implicit operands");
39 assert(MCI.getOperand(MCI.getNumOperands() - 1).isInst() &&
40 "Implicit bits and flags");
41 assert(MCI.getOperand(MCI.getNumOperands() - 2).isImm() &&
42 "Parent pointer");
43 }
44
45 void setPacketBegin(bool Y);
46 bool isPacketBegin() const;
47 static const size_t packetBeginIndex = 0;
48 void setPacketEnd(bool Y);
49 bool isPacketEnd() const;
50 static const size_t packetEndIndex = 1;
51 void resetPacket();
52
53 // Return the slots used by the insn.
54 unsigned getUnits(const HexagonTargetMachine *TM) const;
55
56 // Return the Hexagon ISA class for the insn.
57 unsigned getType() const;
58
59 MCInstrDesc const &getDesc() const;
60
61 // Return whether the insn is an actual insn.
62 bool isCanon() const;
63
64 // Return whether the insn is a prefix.
65 bool isPrefix() const;
66
67 // Return whether the insn is solo, i.e., cannot be in a packet.
68 bool isSolo() const;
69
70 // Return whether the instruction needs to be constant extended.
71 bool isConstExtended() const;
72
73 // Return constant extended operand number.
74 unsigned short getCExtOpNum(void) const;
75
76 // Return whether the insn is a new-value consumer.
77 bool isNewValue() const;
78
79 // Return whether the instruction is a legal new-value producer.
80 bool hasNewValue() const;
81
82 // Return the operand that consumes or produces a new value.
83 const MCOperand &getNewValue() const;
84
85 // Return number of bits in the constant extended operand.
86 unsigned getBitCount(void) const;
87
88private:
89 // Return whether the instruction must be always extended.
90 bool isExtended() const;
91
92 // Return true if the insn may be extended based on the operand value.
93 bool isExtendable() const;
94
95 // Return true if the operand can be constant extended.
96 bool isOperandExtended(const unsigned short OperandNum) const;
97
98 // Return the min value that a constant extendable operand can have
99 // without being extended.
100 int getMinValue() const;
101
102 // Return the max value that a constant extendable operand can have
103 // without being extended.
104 int getMaxValue() const;
105};
106}
107
108#endif
Y
static RegisterPass< Hello2 > Y("hello2", "Hello World Pass (with getAnalysisUsage implemented)")
